overall.description: A first-person walk through a deserted desert trailer park community at dusk in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves along dirt roads past small houses with solar panels and satellite dishes, circling around buildings with mountains visible in the distance under a twilight sky with a visible moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert residential street with small houses and solar panels

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the center of a dirt road between small desert homes

entered.detail: small beige house with two solar panels mounted on the roof
single-story residential building with wooden fence
tall palm tree silhouetted against the twilight sky
distant mountain silhouette under the dusk sky
tall pole with multiple antennae and equipment

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a quiet desert residential street at dusk. The camera moves forward along a dirt path between small houses, with a palm tree visible on the left and mountains in the distance. The environment is completely deserted with no visible activity.

scene_state.functional_zone: side path along building with multiple solar panels

events.description: camera turns right to follow path alongside residential building with solar panels

agents.ego_description: turning right to navigate around a building and continuing along its side

entered.detail: long building with four solar panels arranged in a row on the roof
circular satellite dish mounted on the roof of the building
wooden plank fence running along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and moves along the side of a long building featuring multiple solar panels on its roof. A wooden fence runs along the left side of the path while the moon becomes visible in the upper right corner of the sky. The palm tree passes from left to right as the camera navigates around the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open dirt road with green storage structure

events.description: camera turns left to continue down main road away from the building
returning to open street view with distant mountain vista and scattered buildings

agents.ego_description: continuing down the road past a green covered structure and returning toward the open residential area

entered.detail: long building covered with green tarp or roofing material
solar panel arrays visible on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and moves away from the building, passing a green covered structure on the left. The view opens up again to show the wider desert community with scattered houses and solar panels. The camera continues down the road, looping back toward the original area with the mountain range once again visible in the center distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a deserted desert residential community that circles around a central structure before returning to a wide view of the landscape. It begins by moving forward along a quiet dirt path between small houses, with a lone palm tree to the left and distant mountains under a twilight sky. As the camera turns right, it glides along the side of a long building topped with solar panels, passing a wooden fence while the moon emerges in the upper right corner of the frame. The scene then shifts as the camera turns left and moves away from the building past a green covered structure, allowing the view to expand across the scattered houses of the community. Finally, the camera continues down the road, looping back toward the original area with the mountain range once again centering the horizon.
